items.name: 板碑
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)

en.description_en: A stone stupa slab (itabi) classified as a monument (historic site). It is town-designated in Ōe Town, designated on 1978-01-17, and located at 661-1 Nukumi.

items.name: 大江町立歴史民俗資料館

en.name_en: Ōe Town Museum of History and Folklore
en.description_en: The Ōe Town Museum of History and Folklore, a building classified as a tangible cultural property in the category of structures. It is town-designated in Ōe Town, designated on 1979-08-30, and located at 373-1 Hongōchō.
A Buddhist altar curtain (mitochō) classified as a tangible cultural property in the category of crafts. It is town-designated in Ōe Town, designated on 1985-03-23, and located at 373-1 Hongōchō.

items.name: 左沢城主酒井直次の墓
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)

en.name_romaji: Atezawa Jōshu Sakai Naotsugu no Haka
en.name_en: Grave of Sakai Naotsugu, Lord of Atezawa Castle
en.description_en: The grave of Sakai Naotsugu, lord of Atezawa Castle, classified as a monument (historic site). It is town-designated in Ōe Town, designated on 1989-03-08, and located at 525 Hongō-ki.

items.name: 左沢城主酒井直次夫人の墓
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)

en.name_romaji: Atezawa Jōshu Sakai Naotsugu Fujin no Haka
en.name_en: Grave of the Wife of Sakai Naotsugu, Lord of Atezawa Castle
en.description_en: The grave of the wife of Sakai Naotsugu, lord of Atezawa Castle, classified as a monument (historic site). It is town-designated in Ōe Town, designated on 1989-03-08, and located at 525 Hongō-ki.
The temple gate of Kokaiin classified as a tangible cultural property in the category of structures. It is town-designated in Ōe Town, designated on 1989-03-08, and located at 7 Hongō-ki.

items.name: 矢引沢の大スギ
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)

en.description_en: A large cedar tree classified as a monument (natural monument). It is town-designated in Ōe Town, designated on 1991-09-20, and located at 1063 Yanagisawa.
